data.body:
PASS 1 review — T8 (LLM/prompt structural-completeness overlay): clean for Cluster 1.

This overlay is conditioned on the plan defining an LLM/agent system (prompts, sub-agents, reviewers, output schemas, enums). Cluster 1 is a pure byte-preserving DRY refactor of canonical-JSON/content-hash encoders onto the `_store/canonical.py` seam; it defines no prompts, agents, reviewers, output schemas, or enum value vocabularies. Trigger condition not met.

Tool-verified the one near-LLM touchpoint: `src/rebar/llm/workflow/schema.py` `canonical_json`/`content_hash` (lines 390-403) are deterministic JSON serialization helpers, not prompt/enum definitions; the plan's re-export-preservation AC matches the existing public names. No undefined-but-referenced enum/protocol, no ambiguous counter, no unspecified sub-step fallback (the `ascii_only=True` / `default=str` variants are each explicitly justified with a cited consumer in the ACs), and no instruction-locality antipattern.

Findings: none for T8.
